infringements.steward_decision_summary: 2026 MONACO GRAND PRIX 07 - 09 June 2026 The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 10:10 Friday June 5, in relation to the incident below: The Stewards From The Stewards To The Team Manager, McLaren Mastercard F1 Team Document 11 Date 04 June 2026 Time 17:24 No / D

raw_text_excerpt:
2026 MONACO GRAND PRIX
07 - 09 June 2026
The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 10:10 Friday June 5, in
relation to the incident below: 
 
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To The Team Manager,
McLaren Mastercard F1 Team
Document 11
Date 04 June 2026
Time 17:24
No / Driver 1 - Lando Norris
Reason Alleged breach of Article B10.1.1.a of the FIA F1 Regulations - Late attendance of
the Thursday Press Conference. 
Garry Connelly Tanja Geilhausen
Derek Warwick Jean-François Calmes
